description:
Parent epic: V3 E5: Controls and human in the loop

Source task 7/9 from MILESTONE_V3.md:

- Make human-in-the-loop a named feature using interrupts and approvals.

Epic closure criteria:
- Controls are the one public policy concept
- human-in-the-loop is demonstrated without new runtime machinery
- raising controls cannot crash the agent process

comments.text: Added Jidoka.Approval.request/2 as the named human-in-the-loop helper for controls. It returns a structured approval interrupt and is covered by control runner tests and README feature text.

title: E5: Make human-in-the-loop a named feature using interrupts and approvals
